title: Update Instance Setting
content:
# Update Instance Setting

Update an existing Instance Settings. Any parameters that are not provided will remain unchanged.

## Endpoint

`POST /instance/settings/{setting_name}/update`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.instance.updateInstanceSettings()
print(response)

parameters.name: setting_name
parameters.description: Unique identifier `name` of the Instance Setting to update.

payload.description: The Instance Settings. The structure of this `payload` object depends on the type of Instance Setting being defined.

created.description: UTC time when the Instance Setting was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.

name.description: Unique identifier `name` of the Instance Setting.

payload.description: The Instance Settings. The structure of this `payload` object depends on the type of Instance Setting being defined.

updated.description: UTC time when any Instance Settings keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
